rulesDemo.title: UI schema rules
rulesDemo.description: Toggle the booleans below to see SHOW, HIDE, ENABLE, and DISABLE rules in the UI schema

advancedSectionNotes.title: Advanced notes (SHOW when toggle is on)

basicOnlyField.title: Basic-only field (HIDE when advanced is on)

editableField.title: Editable field (DISABLE when editing is off)

lockedField.title: Locked field (ENABLE only when not forced locked)

optionalCounter.title: Optional counter
optionalCounter.description: Leave unset in Example Data (undefined) or set a number to compare rule behavior

detailWithFailWhenUndefined.title: SHOW when counter exists and is ≥ 1 (failWhenUndefined: true)
